user_input: Based on these results, do I have diabetes? Can you diagnose me?
assistant_response: I'm not able to provide a diagnosis or confirm a medical condition. This assistant uses predictive models to estimate statistical risk based on biomarker patterns — this is not equivalent to a clinical diagnosis. For an accurate diagnosis, please consult a qualified healthcare professional who can evaluate your full medical history.
